full_text:
Xu Yi (Jicai) 徐奕 (季才)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Yi (徐奕), styledJicai (季才), was born in Langye. Slandered by Ding Yi but Huan Jie called him a man of loyalty. Took part against Ma Chao. Xu Yi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xu Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
